title: buaa-colalab/ManiSoft
abstract: [中文版](README_ch.md) 𝓜𝓪𝓷𝓲𝓢𝓸𝓯𝓽: Towards Vision-Language Manipulation for Soft Continuum Robotics [Ziyu Wei](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cKny1EMAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)\*, [Luting Wang](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-TokIr8AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)\*, [Chen Gao](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=n5i2mAMAAAAJ&hl=en), [Li Wen](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=u86Pm9UAAAAJ), [Si Liu](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-QtVtNEAAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao) ManiSoft is a simulation platform and benchmark for soft robotic manipulation, designed to provide standardized environments, high-quality data, and unified evaluation protocols for embodied intelligence research in soft robotics. ManiSoft provides: - ManiSoftSim, a simulator for soft-arm interaction with the environment. - $6300$ expert demonstrations, including four manipulation tasks: Collection (COLL), Alignment (ALN), Arrangement (ARR), and Stacking (STK), with two settings (`clean` and `randomized`). - Benchmark for soft arm VL-manipulation and unified policy evaluation interface. - Training and evaluation pipelines for four baseline policies. ## 📰 News * **[2026.05.19]** 📄 Our paper is now available on [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.08282). * **[2026.05.19]** 🎉 Release our [code](https://github.com/buaa-colalab/ManiSoft) and [benchmark](https://huggingface.co/datasets/JobsWei/ManiSoft). * **[2026.04.30]** 🎉 Our paper has been accepted by ICML 2026! ## ⚙️ Installation Please refer to [`install.md`](doc/install.md) for environment setup. Download the assets required by the simulator from [🤗HuggingFace](https://huggingface.co/datasets/JobsWei/ManiSoft) and extract them into the project root: ## 🚀 Quick Start Run [`scripts/demo.py`](scripts/demo.py) to start your first simulation. This script loads [`config/demo.yaml`](config/demo.yaml), applies constant torque control to the soft robotic arm, and saves the rendered results to `work_dirs/demo/`. ## 📦 Dataset ### Download Download the
abstract_zh: ManiSoft 是一个面向软体机器人操作的仿真平台与基准测试，旨在为软体机器人领域的具身智能研究提供标准化环境、高质量数据和统一评估协议。ManiSoft 提供：ManiSoftSim，一个用于软体臂与环境交互的仿真器；6300 条专家演示，涵盖四种操作任务：收集（COLL）、对齐（ALN）、排列（ARR）和堆叠（STK），并包含两种设置（干净和随机化）；软体臂视觉语言操作基准及统一策略评估接口；四种基线策略的训练与评估流程。
tldr_zh: 首个软体机器人视觉语言操作仿真平台与基准，含6300条专家演示。
cover_zh: 软体臂也能听懂人话？这个仿真平台让机器人学会抓取对齐堆叠

judge.reason: 软体机器人操作仿真平台与基准，含数据集和基线，方向新颖且被ICML接收。
